channel.title: beauty on fritzvd
channel.description: Recent content in beauty on fritzvd

item.title: Beauty: an escape from the material
item.description: There lies within us a desire to transcend our humanness. That humanness that is quite ordinary and even banal. That which smells, is sticky, is inevitable and very everyday humanness. We cover our odours, our blemishes and our imperfections, with attire, decoration and cosmetic products. The most profound escape of our humanness however comes not in our trying to polish our stubby, warty meatbag of a body, but when we experience beauty.
